field_mappings.normalized_meaning: Stable privacy-safe session/thread identifier shown as a short id.
field_mappings.differences: Copilot stores one directory per local session.

field_mappings.normalized_meaning: Sanitized repo/workspace display name, never a raw path.
Model/task round trips observed for a session.
field_mappings.differences: Copilot has explicit assistant turn events.

field_mappings.normalized_meaning: Privacy-safe count of tool launches grouped into Mission Control categories.
field_mappings.differences: Copilot tool categorization is schema-driven by provider-schemas/copilot.json.

field_mappings.normalized_meaning: Provider-normalized event kind consumed by Mission Control UI.
field_mappings.differences: Copilot already emits the normalized event names the UI understands.
Copilot records full token totals through shutdown and compaction events.
